title: America's Top War Unicorn To Begin Combat Drone Production As Next-Gen Startups Challenge Big Defense Primes
summary:
America's Top War Unicorn To Begin Combat Drone Production As Next-Gen Startups Challenge Big Defense Primes

            Weaponized AI, interceptor drones, automated kill chains, ground robots armed with machine guns, humanoid robots, and FPVs equipped with shaped charges all offer a scary preview of what warfare in the 2030s was expected to look like.

Instead, four years of war in Ukraine, followed by the U.S.-Iran conflict, have sharply accelerated that timeline, pulling the future of warfar
summary_ko: 미국 최고의 군사 드론 스타트업이 전투용 드론 생산을 시작하며, 새로운 기술이 등장하고 있습니다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S.- and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: Earendil Labs는 인공지능 기반 의약품 개발사로, 7억 8,700만 달러의 자금을 확보했다. 이 자금은 미국과 중국에 기반을 둔 이 회사가 약 20개의 의약품 파이프라인을 구축하고, Sanofi와 두 개의 수익성 있는 파트너십을 형성하는 데 사용될 예정이다.

title: Gilead bets $1.68B upfront on Ouro Medicines’ autoimmune program, with Galapagos expected to pitch in
summary: Gilead Sciences is set to join the T-cell engager space in an unusual – perhaps even unprecedented – deal arrangement that involves the pharma budgeting $1.675 billion upfront to buy Ouro Medicines and for Galapagos ...
summary_ko: Gilead Sciences는 Ouro Medicines의 자이로프로그램에 16.8억 달러를 투자하여 T-cell engager 공간에 진출합니다. 이는 기존 섹터 내에서의 큰 변화입니다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: Novartis는 Synnovation Therapeutics의 유방암 약물을 20억 달러에 인수했다. 이 약물은 PIK3CA 돌연변이에 의해 성장하는 종양을 표적으로 하는 약물이다.

title: Lilly’s three-pronged obesity drug hits goal in large diabetes trial
summary: Retatrutide, a possible advance on GLP-1 drugs like Zepbound, significantly cut blood sugar and body weight in the study, a sign it might be similarly impactful against obesity.
summary_ko: Lilly의 3중 작용 비만 약물 Retatrutide는 대규모 당뇨병 임상 시험에서 목표를 달성했다. 이 약물은 GLP-1 약물과 유사한 효과를 나타냈다.

title: Merck partners with Flagship startup Quotient to search for genetic clues to IBD
summary:
Quotient Therapeutics, a startup studying how tiny genetic typos cause some cells to get sick but allow others to remain healthy, has struck a partnership with Merck.
 The partnership will identify new drug targets for ...
summary_ko: Merck는 Flagship의 스타트업 Quotient와 제휴하여 유전적 단서를 찾습니다. 이는 유망한 밸류체인(소부장) 발견입니다.
